title: clematis armandi var. hefengensis
intro: Clematis armandi var. hefengensis, also known as He Feng Clematis, is a type of flowering vine native to China, characterized by its white or pale yellow flowers and fragrant scent. This plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Clematis armandi var. hefengensis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of fever and pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also dried and used in capsules or tablets for its medicinal properties.
